autoResolvedAttacksCount.description: The number of attacks that were automatically resolved during a specified time period.

epochTime.description: The time at the end of the specified time period during which attacks were automatically resolved.

getautoResolvedAttacks.description: A list of attacks that were automatically resolved. Each item on the list contains a count of attacks during a specified time period.

lastUpdated.description: The last time the client responded to a request to update the last time an attack was automatically resolved.

clientsCount.description: The number of clients that use this definition revision number.

clientDefStatusList.description: The list of client definition revision numbers.

lastUpdated.description: The last time the client updated its definition revision number.

clientsCount.description: The number of clients on each product version.

formattedVersion.description: The formatted product version number. For example, 12.1.5 (12.1 RU5) build 5337, or 12.1 (12.1) build 4971.

lastUpdated.description: The last time the client updated its client version.

status.description: The client's online status. Possible values are Online or Offline.

clientCountStatsList.description: A list of the online or offline status of the clients.

lastUpdated.description: The last time the client updated its online status.

clientCount.description: A count of clients by content download source.

sourceKey.description: The key that identifies the content download source. Possible values are SEPM, GUP, PUBLIC_LU, INTERNAL_LUA, or OTHER.

sourceName.description: The name of the content download source. Possible values are Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager, Group Update Provider, LiveUpdate, Internal LiveUpdate, or Other.

downloadSources.description: A list of the available client download sources.

lastUpdated.description: The last time the client updated this information.

epochTime.description: The time at the end of the specified time period during which malware against clients was found.

lastUpdated.description: The last time the client updated its malware client count.

malwareClientStats.description: The list of clients that report malware.

protectionEnabledClientCount.description: A list of how many clients have a specific protection technology enabled.

protectionName.description: The name of the protection technology that detected the risk. Possible values are Antivirus, SONAR, Download Insight, or CIDS.

riskCount.description: The list of the number of risks sorted by the protection technology that detected them.

riskDistributionStats.description: The list of risk distribution statistics.

info.description: This page documents the REST APIs that perform Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager operations.
info.title: Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager API Reference

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: The end time for gathering these statistics.

parameters.name: reportType
parameters.description: The type of report. Report types are Hour, Day, Week, and Month.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: The start time for gathering these statistics.

parameters.name: timeZone
parameters.description: The time zone of the returned events. The default is UTC.

200.description: The web service successfully processed the web request and returned a result.

401.description: The user that is currently logged on has insufficient rights to execute the web method, or the user is unauthorized.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

500.description: The web service encountered an error while processing the web request.
